sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2026-03-08 09:16
- Distance: 7.4 km
- Moving time: 47:55
- Elapsed time: 48:08
- Elevation gain: 134.8 m
- Average heart rate: 167.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 185 bpm
- Average watts: 199.1 W
- Average speed: 9.3 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `242` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `167.9 bpm`, ranging from `97.5` to `184.3 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `162.1 bpm` and second-half average HR was `173.4 bpm` (+11.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `167.6 spm`, with a working range of `102.5` to `188.0 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `169.4 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `165.7 spm` (-3.6 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:27 /km` across `7.424 km` in `47:55` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:16 /km` and second-half pace was `6:38 /km` (+23 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `167.7 bpm` average and `185 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `161.6 bpm` in the first half and `173.4 bpm` in the second (+11.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `47:55` out of `48:08` elapsed (99.5%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `8` stop segments and `1.1%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `146.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `36.2 m` and `63.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `67.6 m` in the first half and `78.6 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
